# Review Feedback

  Record corrections to the agent's review behavior here.
  The agent reads this file before every review and applies these rules with highest precedence.

  Action types:
  - skip: agent flagged a false positive — suppress this pattern going forward
  - elevate:critical / elevate:warning: agent under-reported severity — promote it
  - rule: agent missed something — add it as a required check (treated as critical)
